name: Evilswarm Ouroboros
name_jp: ヴェルズ・ウロボロス
desc:
3 Level 4 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then activate 1 of these effects. Each effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field.
● Target 1 card your opponent controls; return that target to the hand.
● Send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY.
● Target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish that target.
mnst_eff:

● Target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish that target.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Once while face-up on the field
